series_metadata.series_description: This record shows legal basis for registraton as a public accountant. Includes application for registration as a public accountant, correspondence to and from the applicant/licensee, education records and information, and verification of experience forms. May also contain equivalent examination applications, ethics exam results, renewal information, continuing education reporting forms, and requests for license verification.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: scanned or two months death of licensee ; Electronic: two months death of certificate holder
